website_fit_notes: no-fit - already has strong digital presence
notes: Founded 1969. One of world's largest independent aerospace companies. 2500 employees across multiple global facilities. Full MRO + manufacturing + composites. Way above Athelon ICP - enterprise tier with own IT. Disqualified.

FAA repair station. Avionics bench shop (Nav/Comm/GPS/Instruments). Co-located with Porter Strait Instruments. 30+ years in business. Gen/corp aviation avionics only. Very small team. Website is circa 2005 - prime redesign target. Low ERP need given small scale.

website_fit_notes: HIGH-FIT - site is very dated and basic
notes: FAA Repair Station P46R287Y at KRVS Tulsa Riverside. Specialty: Continental/Lycoming overhaul. Beechcraft Bonanza + Cessna 210 focus. Owner-operated by Bill Cunningham. Very small shop. Dates-stamped website by SigmaTek/VirtualTulsa. Strong website redesign opportunity but ERP need is minimal at this scale.

erp_fit_notes: possible-fit - if MX ops are substantial
notes: Located at Wiley Post Airport (KPWA). OKC's premier FBO. Offers fueling + hangaring + aircraft maintenance + charter. AEG Fuels partner. Modern website. FBO model - MRO is secondary to fueling/handling. ERP fit depends on maintenance volume. Not a pure Part 145 shop - confirm certification. Website already reasonably modern.

website_fit_notes: low-fit - site recently rebranded and modernized 2025
notes: Founded 1971. Recently unified brand (Aero-Mach Labs + TCO Manufacturing + Wilco Aircraft Parts). ~100+ employees across 3 entities. $26M revenue est (Zippia). Specializes in aircraft instrument repair/OH/exchange and fuel system components. Won 2025 Aerospace Supply Chain Award. Serves OEMs/MROs/military/fleets. Medium-tier - possible ERP buyer but likely already has systems. Website just modernized - low redesign need near-term.

website_fit_notes: MEDIUM-FIT - basic site functional but not impressive
notes: NOTE: Could not confirm exact 'Aircraft Propeller Service' in Tulsa - closest match is Aircraft Accessories of Oklahoma (aircraftaccessoriesofok.com) at Tulsa. FAA Repair Station #RV3R829L. Class I/II accessories. Since 1959. Authorized RAPCO/GAMI distributor. Prop shop + accessories. Family-owned small shop. Possible mix-up with shop name - needs verification. If this is the target shop, moderate redesign opportunity.
